---
title: "The Orphan, or, The renowned history of little Gaffer Two-Shoes, otherwise call\'d Mr. Tommy Two-Shoes, brother to the celebrated Goody Two-Shoes"
---

## The Orphan, or, The renowned history of little Gaffer Two-Shoes, otherwise call\'d Mr. Tommy Two-Shoes, brother to the celebrated Goody Two-Shoes
**Date:** <i>c.</i> 1780
**Imprint:** London: Roberts

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
